# Sprint 8.1 Risk Assessment

**Sprint:** Sprint 8. Risks Assumptions And Constraints
**Objective:** Identify and mitigate risks, assumptions, and constraints that may impact platform development and deployment.

## Description
Conduct a risk assessment to identify potential risks, including data quality issues, changing business definitions, and adoption challenges.

## Deliverable
Risk assessment report
